rationale: The response completely omits GDPR—the only applicable regime for an EU-only B2B SaaS—while citing Privacy Shield as currently ratified (it was invalidated by Schrems II in July 2020), CCPA (no California nexus exists), and HIPAA (no US healthcare context); these are fabricated or wholly inapplicable legal obligations presented as definitive requirements with no caveats.
rubric_evidence: the applicable regime is the EU-US Privacy Shield framework (as ratified by the EU Commission)
CCPA compliance for any California residents whose data might transit the system
HIPAA safeguards if any health-adjacent performance metrics are collected
